title: Tech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Tech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Dutch phone giant Odido says millions of customers affected by data breach

items.title: Here's Why I'd Buy the Last Samsung Soundbar First
items.description: Going one or two generations back in Samsung's Q990 soundbar series is the smartest way to get insane home theater sound.

items.title: Waymo is asking DoorDash drivers to shut the doors of its self-driving cars
items.description: If a passenger accidentally leaves a Waymo door open, the vehicle can get stuck in place.

items.title: The Best Mattress Toppers (2026): Supportive, Plush, Memory Foam
items.description: These toppers will transform your mattress into exactly what you need, whether that’s a super-plush pillow top, memory foam, or targeted back support.

items.title: Score, the dating app for people with good credit, is back

items.title: Amazon’s Ring cancels partnership with Flock, a network of AI cameras used by ICE, feds, and police
items.description: This news comes less than a week after Ring's Super Bowl commercial stoked controversy over the company's capacity for mass surveillance.

items.title: Meta plans to add facial recognition to its smart glasses, report claims

items.title: For $1M, you can pay Bryan Johnson (or BryanAI?) to teach you how to live longer
items.description: The longevity-obsessed investor Bryan Johnson is charging $1 million to sign up for his "Immortals" program.
